name: Referral Programme Tracker
description: Referral Programme Tracker - Marketing template for growth professionals
instructions: How to Use This Template 1. Programme Setup Define your referral programme structure, goals, and reward tiers. 2. Dashboard Monitor programme health with auto-calculated KPIs. 3. Advocate Tracker Track all advocates (referrers) and their activity. 4. Referral Pipeline Manage every referral from invitation to conversion. 5. Reward Management Track reward eligibility, payouts, and costs. 6. Programme Performance Analyse programme metrics over time to optimise. 7. Communication Templates Ready-to-use email and message templates for each stage.

sections.title: Dashboard
sections.description: Auto-calculated summary of your data. Complete the working sections to see results here.
